channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 alibaba/open-code-review (7322 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: alibaba

📝 Repository: alibaba/open-code-review

📄 Descrizione: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

⭐ Stelle: 7322

🍴 Forks: 432

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: agent code-review code-review-assistant harness repository-level-context

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-18T02:16:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-16T07:13:49Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 perplexityai/bumblebee (4487 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: perplexityai

📝 Repository: perplexityai/bumblebee

📄 Descrizione: Read-only developer endpoint scanner for on-disk package, extension, and developer-tool metadata, built to check exposure to known software supply-chain compromises.

⭐ Stelle: 4487

🍴 Forks: 408

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: golang package-inventory supply-chain-security

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-20T18:11:37Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-18T02:55:52Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 mvanhorn/agentcookie (462 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mvanhorn

📝 Repository: mvanhorn/agentcookie

📄 Descrizione: Your agent runs on a Mac that isn't your daily driver. agentcookie keeps its sessions in sync with the Mac you actually browse on, continuously, encrypted over Tailscale, so OpenClaw, Hermes, or any other agent runtime wakes up authenticated. macOS, peer-to-peer, no cloud middleman.

⭐ Stelle: 462

🍴 Forks: 31

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: ai-agents automation chrome cli cookies golang macos tailscale

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-16T19:10:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-14T05:05:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: walkingddd

📝 Repository: walkingddd/CPA-Helper

📄 Descrizione: CPA-Helper is a local, self-hosted multi-user management panel designed for CLIProxyAPI users. It features independent API keys per user, isolated usage statistics, detailed request tracking, model pricing maintenance, available model querying, administrator account management, and Codex account inspection.

item.title: 🐹 IRNova/NovaRadar (157 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: IRNova

📝 Repository: IRNova/NovaRadar

📄 Descrizione: Nova Radar is a desktop IP scanner built with Go + React. It scans Cloudflare IP ranges from multiple selectable sources, performs real two-phase verification (TCP + TLS handshake), and outputs working IPs sorted by latency. Built by Nova Proxy Group.

⭐ Stelle: 157

🍴 Forks: 11

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-31T06:23:29Z

item.title: 🐹 baidu/nettools (152 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: baidu

📝 Repository: baidu/nettools

📄 Descrizione: A physical network blackbox monitoring toolkit with diagnostic and probing capabilities for link quality, path tracing, packet modification detection, loss localization, and bandwidth measurement, enabling end-to-end reliability in large-scale data centers.

⭐ Stelle: 152

🍴 Forks: 26

💻 Linguaggio: Go

item.title: 🐹 ory/talos (129 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ory

📝 Repository: ory/talos

📄 Descrizione: Web-scale and security-hardened API key server for users, services, machine to machine, and AI agents. Token derivation brings fine-grained capability tokens to avoid common API key pitfalls. Apache2 open source for indie deployments, commercial for scalable and HA.
